dimensions.label: Attachment Anxiety
dimensions.description: Adult attachment dimension: fear of rejection, abandonment, or partner unavailability.

dimensions.label: Attachment Avoidance
dimensions.description: Adult attachment dimension: discomfort with closeness, dependence, or intimacy.

dimensions.label: Interpersonal Agency/Dominance
dimensions.description: Interpersonal circumplex axis: agency, dominance, status, control, and assertive interpersonal stance.

dimensions.label: Interpersonal Communion/Warmth
dimensions.description: Interpersonal circumplex axis: communion, warmth, affiliation, friendliness, and care.
